greeting: Hello {{name}}, how can I help you?
subtitle: An intelligent CRM assistant for quick questions about your demands, quotations, orders, and activities.
chatTitle: What should we review together today?
chatDescription: The first secure question-answer flow for your CRM data is active. You can ask about demands, quotations, orders, activities, and ERP summaries.
inputPlaceholder: For example: How many quotations did I create this month?
comingSoon: The chat engine is being prepared. This area will soon be able to talk with your CRM data.

suggestions.1: How many quotations did I create this month?
suggestions.2: What is my approved order rate?
suggestions.3: How many activities have I completed?

chatHint: I can answer performance, count, rate, ERP integration, and error explanation questions.
promptGuideDescription: Choose a suggestion or write naturally in your own words.
enterToSend: Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds a new line.
responseLanguageAuto: Reply automatically based on the question language
sidebarLinkDescription: When enabled, the AI Assistant link appears in the left menu and the floating panel is disabled.
sidebarLinkEnabledNotice: After confirming, the floating panel will close. You will only access AI Assistant through the sidebar link or the full page.
showFloatingWidgetDialogDescription: After confirming, you will be redirected to the home page and the floating AI Assistant panel will open. You will leave this page.
openFromRail: Open AI assistant from side rail
imageTooLarge: Image can be up to {{size}} MB.
imageUnsupported: Only PNG, JPG/JPEG or WEBP images can be attached.
imageContextHint: Screenshot attached. If you also write the error text, I can explain it more clearly.

steps.3: Preparing the answer and recommended checks...

analytics.noFailedIntent: No failed intent appears in this period.

apiErrors.greeting: AI assistant greeting could not be loaded.
apiErrors.answer: AI assistant answer could not be loaded.
apiErrors.history: AI conversation history could not be loaded.
apiErrors.analytics: AI assistant analytics could not be loaded.
apiErrors.action: AI action could not be confirmed.
